original_abstract: This research explores the transformative impact of the digital era on the traditional landscapes of entrepreneurship and innovation. As rapid technological advancements dismantle conventional business boundaries, new dynamics and systemic challenges emerge, requiring a reevaluation of existing business strategies. Utilizing a mixed-methods approach that combines qualitative insights from expert interviews and case studies with quantitative analysis, the study investigates how digital tools—such as artificial intelligence, e-commerce platforms, and data analytics—act as catalysts for organizational change. The findings highlight critical factors for success, including the necessity of continuous innovation, robust cybersecurity measures, and the adoption of strategic information systems (SIS) to enhance competitive advantage. By analyzing the intersection of digital technology and entrepreneurial practice, this paper provides a comprehensive framework for entrepreneurs and stakeholders to navigate uncertainty, optimize global market access, and implement sustainable business transformations in an increasingly interconnected economy.
humanized_abstract: Title: The Changing Entrepreneurial Landscape in the Digital Economy: Challenges, Opportunities and Strategies Entrepreneurship and innovation in the digital economy have been subject to tremendous changes as a result of the rapid developments in digital technologies, eroding in the process the existing borders and frameworks of traditional businesses and, thereby, creating new structures and challenges in business that need to be taken into account. In this study we applied a mixed methods research methodology including both qualitative and quantitative data that are derived from expert interviews and cases as well as quantitative analyses of a number of digital technologies including among others artificial intelligence, e-commerce, and data analysis that enable companies to overcome the challenges they encounter in their transition to digital economy. Through the analysis of digital technologies and entrepreneurial practices, this study contributes significantly to the knowledge of the challenges facing today’s entrepreneurs, and to their readiness in dealing with them; in addition to contributing to the identification of the key performance indicators for start-ups, as well as facilitating their access to global markets and assuring the sustainability of the digital economy transitions in the context of a globalised economy.
